articles.title: ADOBE LAUNCHES A FOUNDRY SERVICE THAT BUILDS CUSTOM GENERATIVE AI MODELS FOR ENTERPRISES
articles.summary: The Adobe AI Foundry is a service that enables enterprises to build custom generative AI models trained on their own branding and intellectual property to create text, images, video, and 3D content. The models are built on Adobe's Firefly family, which uses only licensed training data and is priced based on usage rather than per seat. The service helps brands scale personalized advertising campaigns across different seasons, languages, and formats while keeping humans at the center of creativity.

articles.title: GOOGLE PLAY STORE ADOPTS MATERIAL 3 EXPRESSIVE DESIGN FOR ENHANCED UX
articles.summary: Google's Play Store is implementing Material 3 Expressive design, introducing bolder colors, fluid animations, and adaptive layouts to create more intuitive and engaging app discovery experiences. The redesign extends across Android's ecosystem, including the Phone app and Wear OS, with phased rollouts planned alongside future Pixel launches to gather user feedback. This strategic shift aims to enhance user retention and discoverability in a competitive marketplace, responding to rivals like Samsung's One UI 7 while offering developers new personalization tools.

articles.title: IOS 26.1 BETA 4 ADDS NEW SETTING TO TONE DOWN LIQUID GLASS TRANSPARENCY
articles.summary: Apple's new Liquid Glass design in iOS 26, iPadOS 26, and macOS 26 introduced a transparent, fluid look across devices. In response to user feedback, iOS 26.1 beta 4 now adds a “Tinted” option to make Liquid Glass more opaque and contrasted. It is available under Display & Brightness (iPhone/iPad) or Appearance (Mac), and applies system-wide, including third-party apps.

articles.title: THE END OF THE USER INTERFACE? HOW AI AGENTS ARE REWRITING UX
articles.summary: AI agents are transforming user experience by enabling task delegation through natural language rather than traditional screen-based interactions, shifting design focus from pixel-perfect interfaces to trust, transparency, and conversational systems. This evolution is powered by generative AI, large language models, and hyperpersonalization that allow agents to understand intent, automate complex workflows, and adapt to individual users autonomously. UX professionals must now develop new skills in agent design, dialogue modeling, and ethical AI practices as interfaces become ambient and intelligence-based rather than visual.

articles.title: AI STARTUPS RISK FORGETTING THE ‘U' IN UX
articles.summary: Enterprise AI faces a 95% pilot failure rate essentially because startups prioritize technological capability over user experience, creating powerful but unusable tools that don't integrate into existing workflows. Definely's co-founders discovered that solving enterprise problems in legacy industries requires embedding real users with lived experience into product teams, ensuring technology serves established workflows rather than disrupting them. The AI companies that will survive the coming disillusionment focus on transparent, user-centric solutions requiring minimal behavioral change, not those with the most advanced models.

articles.title: THE WRITING IS THE DESIGN
articles.summary: UX writing is integral to design because words shape how users experience products. The Usable, Useful, Responsible framework promotes clear, respectful, and ethical language. Writers should align with strategy, use AI thoughtfully with empathy and clarity, and craft error messages that prevent, explain, and resolve issues.

articles.title: DESIGN BETTER WITH BEAUTIFUL ICONS
articles.summary: Explore the world's most complete icon library, featuring 40,000+ icons, 9 unique styles, and 59 categories. It is perfect for UI/UX designers, developers, and creators.

articles.title: INCLUSIVE DESIGN PRINCIPLES
articles.summary: These Inclusive Design Principles are about putting people first. They're about designing for the needs of people with permanent, temporary, situational, or changing disabilities — all of us, really.

articles.title: THE PRODUCT DESIGN AGENT
articles.summary: Paraflow is an AI product design agent that turns ideas into well-defined specs. It allows you to create PRD, user flow, UI, prototype, and frontend code all in one canvas.

articles.title: WHY DESIGN CRAFT STILL MATTERS IN A WORLD OF AUTOMATION
articles.summary: AI tools can quickly generate design elements but lack the human judgment needed to create meaningful brand identities for nonprofits. True design craft involves deep listening, cultural understanding, and strategic decision-making that machines cannot replicate, transforming organizational values into trusted visual identities. While AI can accelerate exploration, public-facing brand work requires trained designers to ensure consistency, authenticity, and lasting impact over generic, homogenized aesthetics.

articles.title: DISPLAAY RETHINKS LICENSING WITH ITS NEW WEBSITE AND SERRIF TYPEFACE
articles.summary: Prague-based foundry Displaay has revamped its platform with faster-loading variable fonts, a simplified licensing model based on company size, and new tools like a free Editor for font customization and a Tester for seamless experimentation. Alongside the update, the foundry introduced Serrif, a neutral, highly legible serif designed to harmonize with its sans serif Saans, offering 42 weights and three variable axes to give designers a practical, balanced pairing for everyday use.

articles.title: AIRBNB IS BECOMING MORE SOCIAL BY ALLOWING USERS TO CONNECT WITH FELLOW TRAVELERS
articles.summary: Airbnb's latest update focuses on helping travelers connect and improving discovery. Users booking Experiences can now see and message fellow participants, manage privacy settings, and view new Connections on their profiles. The update also introduces smarter search that suggests listings just outside your filters, an upgraded map showing nearby attractions, and an expanded AI assistant with multilingual support across the US, Mexico, and Canada.

articles.title: APPLE AND DESIGN MIAMI CELEBRATE THE NEW GUARD OF CREATIVITY WITH THE INAUGURAL DESIGNERS OF TOMORROW
articles.summary: Apple and Design Miami launched their inaugural Designers of Tomorrow initiative at Design Miami Paris, showcasing four emerging designers whose creative processes are powered by iPad Pro with M5.

articles.title: TOP UX CONFERENCES TO ATTEND IN 2026
articles.summary: Thirteen major UX and HCI conferences are scheduled for 2026, spanning January through September across Europe, North America, and Asia.

articles.title: IKEA'S ADORABLE MINI BEDS ARE THE PERFECT SOLUTION TO LATE NIGHT DOOMSCROLLING
articles.summary: Ikea UAE has launched The Phone Sleep Collection, a playful wellness campaign encouraging people to “put their phones to bed” in mini Ikea-style beds equipped with NFC tags to track sleep.
